idea-plugin.name: ShortURL MCP
idea-plugin.description:
URL Shortening with ShortURL via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

This plugin helps you set up the MCP ShortURL server with JetBrains AI Assistant. Once configured, AI Assistant can create and manage short urls — all powered by Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • 4 AI Tools — Create and manage short URLs
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • Create — Shorten URLs with custom aliases
  • Manage — Update and delete short links
  • Analytics — Track click statistics

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → ShortURL MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud API token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • MCP server integration with JetBrains AI Assistant
  • STDIO and HTTP transport modes
  • Settings UI for API token management
  • One-click MCP config copy
